# Clarenville Dental Care

> Clarenville Dental Care is a dental clinic in Clarenville, Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada.
> This website helps patients learn about services, new-patient information, contact options, CDCP acceptance, and practical dental education.

## Canonical Site

- https://clarenvilledental.com/

## Primary Pages

- Homepage: https://clarenvilledental.com/
- Services: https://clarenvilledental.com/services
- About Us: https://clarenvilledental.com/about-us
- New Patients: https://clarenvilledental.com/new-patients
- FAQ: https://clarenvilledental.com/faq
- Contact: https://clarenvilledental.com/contact
- CDCP: https://clarenvilledental.com/cdcp-dentist-clarenville
- Blog: https://clarenvilledental.com/blog

## Key Service Pages

- Emergency Dentist: https://clarenvilledental.com/emergency-dentist
- Family Dentistry: https://clarenvilledental.com/family-dentistry
- Dental Cleanings: https://clarenvilledental.com/dental-cleanings
- Dental Implants: https://clarenvilledental.com/dental-implants
- Invisalign: https://clarenvilledental.com/invisalign
- Root Canal Treatment: https://clarenvilledental.com/root-canal-treatment
- Cosmetic Dentistry: https://clarenvilledental.com/cosmetic-dentistry
- Wisdom Teeth Removal: https://clarenvilledental.com/wisdom-teeth-removal

## Clinic Facts

- Brand: Clarenville Dental Care
- Address: 259 Memorial Drive, Suite 201, Clarenville, NL A5A 1R4
- Phone: (709) 466-7001
- Email: clarenville.dental@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM; Wednesday 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM; Saturday and Sunday closed
- CDCP: Accepted

## Areas Served

- Clarenville
- Shoal Harbour
- Milton
- Georges Brook
- Deep Bight
- Port Blandford
- Swift Current
- Arnold's Cove
- Sunnyside

## Preferred Content For Citation

- Service pages with direct patient guidance
- New patient information
- CDCP page
- FAQ page
- Blog articles with practical dental education

## Lower-Priority Utility Pages

- Privacy Policy
- Terms of Service
